# scroll(to:)

**Instance Method**

Scrolls the view so that it includes the provided rectangular area.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func scroll(to rect: NSRect)
```

## Parameters

- **rect**: The rectangular area to include in the view.

## Scrolling

- **scroll(to:)**: Scrolls the view to the specified point.
